protein_name: Plays a role in intermediary metabolism and energy production. It may tightly associate or interact with the pyruvate dehydrogenase complex. Belongs to the isocitrate and isopropylmalate dehydrogenases family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Protein type: Carbohydrate Metabolism - citrate (TCA) cycle; EC 1.1.1.42; Mitochondrial; Other Amino Acids Metabolism - glutathione; Oxidoreductase
raw_fields.Molecular Function: isocitrate dehydrogenase (NADP+) activity; magnesium ion binding; metal ion binding; NAD binding; oxidoreductase activity; oxidoreductase activity, acting on the CH-OH group of donors, NAD or NADP as acceptor
raw_fields.Biological Process: 2-oxoglutarate metabolic process; carbohydrate metabolic process; glyoxylate cycle; isocitrate metabolic process; NADP+ biosynthetic process; NADP+ metabolic process; negative regulation of glial cell migration; negative regulation of glial cell proliferation; negative regulation of matrix metallopeptidase secretion; tricarboxylic acid cycle
